title: Italian Sweet Potato Gratin
description: A creamy sweet potato gratin with an Italian twist, perfect for a comforting side dish or main course.
instructions: Peel the sweet potatoes and slice them into 1/8-inch thick rounds.
In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a separate saucepan, combine the heavy cream and grated Grana Padano cheese.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked onion and garlic mixture to the cream sauce and stir to combine.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of sweet potato slices.
Pour some of the cream sauce over the sweet potatoes, then sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Repeat the layering process until all the ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cream sauce and cheese.
Dot the top of the gratin with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sweet potatoes are tender.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
